title: Washington University-Fudan EMBA hosts public lecture on human-AI collaboration and supply chain innovation
description: Shanghai, China, April 21, 2026 -- On March 31, 2026, the Washington University–Fudan University EMBA program held a public lecture at the Zhengli campus of Fudan School of Management,focusing on human-AI collaboration and supply chain innovation in the age of artificial intelligence. The event attracted executives and researchers from academia and industry, offering a platform to explore AI’s impact on business management and operational efficiency.
